summary.business_type: Solo B2B service consultant (sales-systems advisory); content/marketing site with blog funnel
top_findings: Zero JSON-LD structured data on the live site (code exists on an undeployed branch)
No rel=canonical tags on any live page
Two published blog posts link to /ai-solutions/ which returns a hard 404
Legal pages ship empty <title> and meta description
Blog is disconnected from the funnel: 0 of 8 posts link to Scorecard/PRC/CLEAR
quick_wins: Fix the /ai-solutions/ 404 CTAs in 2 posts -> point to /scorecard
Deploy the design-system-sync branch (ships schema + canonicals)
Add a Scorecard CTA to every blog post close

findings.title: No rel=canonical on any live page
findings.recommendation: Set alternates.canonical in every route; the local branch already does this via buildPageMetadata() but it is undeployed.

findings.title: Thin security-header set
findings.description: Only HSTS present; missing X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, frame-ancestors/CSP, Permissions-Policy.
findings.recommendation: Add via next.config headers() or vercel.json.

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: Strong first-person E-E-A-T on key pages

findings.title: Broken CTA: 2 posts link to /ai-solutions/ (404)
findings.description: aida-to-ai-messaging and linkedin-content posts; /ai-solutions returns 404 live.

findings.title: Blog disconnected from funnel
findings.description: 0 of 8 published posts link to Scorecard/PRC/CLEAR; 4 link only to /contact.
findings.recommendation: Add a Scorecard CTA to every post close.

findings.title: Persona / stat mismatch weakens E-E-A-T
findings.description: Posts cite 20+ years/200+ implementations and SaaS/cybersecurity examples vs the solo, 15+ year, B2B-services About page; key stats unsourced.
findings.recommendation: Align case studies to the real client base or add per-post author box; source or replace stats.

findings.title: One thin post with no CTA
findings.recommendation: Expand with follow-on data; add Scorecard CTA.

findings.title: Legal pages ship empty <title> and meta description
findings.description: Live <title> length = 0 on /legal/privacy-policy and /legal/terms-conditions; source .md files lack frontmatter.
findings.recommendation: Add title/description frontmatter to content/legal/*.md or a route-level fallback.

findings.title: Generic short titles on /about and /blog
findings.description: 'About | Anoop Kurup' (19 chars) leaves SERP real estate unused.

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: Complete schema layer written in src/lib/seo.ts (Person, ProfessionalService, WebSite, BlogPosting, Breadcrumb, FAQ, Service) with a correct server-rendered JsonLd component

findings.title: Zero structured data on production
findings.description: grep ld+json = 0 on homepage and blog posts; the schema code lives only on the undeployed design-system-sync branch.

findings.title: BlogPosting publisher is a Person
findings.description: Google prefers an Organization publisher with a logo for Article rich results.
findings.recommendation: Use organizationSchema as publisher and add a logo ImageObject.

findings.title: No BreadcrumbList / FAQPage wired
findings.description: Builders exist but are not emitted on blog posts / offer pages.
findings.recommendation: Wire breadcrumbSchema on blog [slug]; faqPageSchema on /clear and /pipeline-reality-check.

findings.title: No CrUX field confirmation
findings.description: Lab-only signals; traffic may be below CrUX threshold.
findings.recommendation: Confirm field LCP/INP/CLS via GSC/CrUX when available.

findings.title: Verify LCP image priority
findings.description: Ensure hero uses next/image priority for preload.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness
what_works: robots.txt open to all AI crawlers

findings.title: Missing llms.txt
findings.recommendation: Add a static llms.txt listing funnel pages + top posts.

findings.title: No entity grounding (schema undeployed)
findings.description: Without Person/Org JSON-LD, AI engines can't resolve the author entity.

findings.title: Few self-contained answer passages in posts
findings.description: Add TL;DR/definition blocks near the top of pillar posts.

findings.title: Verify next/image priority + dimensions
findings.description: Confirm responsive srcset and explicit sizing to prevent CLS.

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: Deploy the design-system-sync branch -> ships JSON-LD schema + rel=canonical sitewide

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: Add a Scorecard CTA to every blog post close; remove the /workshops/ 308 hop
Wire BreadcrumbList on blog [slug] and FAQPage on /clear + /pipeline-reality-check
Switch BlogPosting publisher to Organization with a logo

phases.name: Phase 3: Content & Authority
items: Reconcile blog persona/case studies with the real client base; add per-post author box
Expand social-media-followers-to-clients; add TL;DR blocks to pillar posts
Add security headers (X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, frame-ancestors)

phases.name: Phase 4: Monitoring & Iteration
items: Verify schema in Rich Results Test post-deploy
Confirm CWV field data in GSC/CrUX
Add lastmod to sitemap; keep the noindex drip gate in sync as drafts go live
